API Documentation

HomeOverviewGetting StartedAuthenticationTransactionsCustomersSubscriptionsSplit PaymentsWebhooksBalance & LedgerSettlementsTransfersDisputesCard TokensKYC VerificationCompliance & AML3D SecureAPI Playground

Authentication

API keys, merchant registration, and authentication flows.

API Key Types

Test Keys
sk_test_...

Use for development and testing. No real money moved.

Live Keys
sk_live_...

Use for production. Moves real money.

Endpoints

POST
/auth/register

Register a new merchant

POST
/auth/api-keys

Generate a new API key

GET
/auth/api-keys

List all API keys

PUT
/auth/api-keys/{id}

Update API key settings

DELETE
/auth/api-keys/{id}

Revoke an API key

Register Merchant

POST /auth/register
1curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/register \
2  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
3  -d '{
4    "businessName": "Acme Corp",
5    "email": "admin@acme.com",
6    "password": "secure-password-123"
7  }'

Security

  • API keys are hashed using bcrypt (12 rounds) before storage
  • Never share your API keys or commit them to version control
  • Generate separate keys for development and production
  • Revoke compromised keys immediately
  • Use environment variables to store API keys in your application
